title: Assigning a PLU to a product
workflow_title: Assigning a PLU to a product

steps.caption: In the DISH POS Backoffice, under Articles open Products.
Find the product you want to edit in the overview.
Click the editing (pencil) icon next to the product.
In the product settings, select Product codes from the left menu.
Enter the PLU in the Product code field.
To add another PLU, click + Add product code.
Click Save to apply the changes.
Then go to General, the sub-category General, and click Send to push the changes to your POS.
